items.name_en: Victoria Beckham Style Chanel Sheepskin Apricot
items.name_cn:
Victoria Beckham Style Chanel Sheepskin Apricot
Out of Print Large Gold Clasp Bag❤️
In Stock. The Chanel Classic Flap Bag was re-released by Karl Lagerfeld in 1983 after taking over Chanel. It is also Lagerfeld's most proud masterpiece. This large CF is very popular among celebrities and bloggers.
Its highlight is the large double C logo with gold plating. The current boutique version no longer has this design; they all have small double Cs. Victoria Beckham likes to shorten the chain of this bag and use it as a handbag.
It features a double-sided flap design with a large capacity for a chain bag. It is lightweight and can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or as a handbag with a shortened chain.
Recommended to buy the Victoria Beckham bag😘
Size 30 21.8cm
No.: A2222

items.name_en: Small Size 18cm "High-end Quality Customization" 🚩🚩🚩 Exclusive Custom Release, Upgraded New OHANEL 24K Autumn/Winter New Makeup Bag 🆕 The makeup bag is a popular style favored by Chanel. Elegant and noble, it can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The body features a double C logo, full of vintage retro style, and the capacity is huge. The shape is structured and suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, all-steel 14k pale gold buckle, and imported sheepskin~ soft to the touch and worth buying, looking noble everywhere! Official website sync: 12.5 X 18 X 6.5 cm

items.name_en: In Stock 22K New Backpack 🖤 AS3662 Patent Leather. Happiness level maxed out 😍 This is a hot item 🔥 The degree of being loved is obvious to all! Waiting for it with bated breath~ Finally got it~ This is simply a blessing for large bag lovers. The space inside is huge, and practicality is super strong 👍 The real thing is truly huge, huge, huge, huge, beautiful. Patent leather has its own luster, not as delicate as sheepskin, but lighter than grained cowhide. Predicted it will be the bag everyone loves this year 👋 It's really , sweet and cool yet retro, this backpack is the center of attention, the patent leather wind of this year, no one can escape 🫶🫶 Simply too addictive! Really explosively good!! (size: 31.5*31*9cm)

items.name_en: /22 Autumn/Winter New AS2844 Hippie Bag is also so fragrant, minimalist design, full of details. Overall curved shape, wide shoulder strap, two black badges on each side, quite a vintage feel. The opening design is more convenient than a zipper. No decoration on the back, very simple. Front paired with a gold chain black gold is an eternal classic! Can be elegant and generous, or cool and cool, no conflict at all. Dimensions: 29*28*7cm
